hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE '^gog (gmail send|drive delete|calendar delete|tasks delete|chat send)' && echo '[gog-workspace] Destructive/send operation detected — please confirm before proceeding.' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE '^gog ' && echo "[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] gog command executed" >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/gog_audit.log" || true
